task_objective: Fix the failed on-device status strip attempt after logs showed BrowserView wrapper methods were missing and local_current skipped results rendered as backup needed.
design_decisions: Normalize BrowserView wrapper objects by checking the root object and nested browserView, BrowserView, m_browserView, and m_browserView.m_browserView fields.
Log candidate object keys and prototype keys when BrowserView normalization cannot find the required methods.
Treat skipped local_current autosync results as up to date instead of backup needed.
Hide the React portal surface during BrowserView-only diagnostics so the diagnostic modes are distinct.
results: Targeted frontend static tests pass after the BrowserView wrapper and local_current fixes.
